title: SQL: select cast('1-2' as interval year to month )
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, interval_col INTERVAL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (interval_col, description) VALUES (INTERVAL '1 year 2 months', 'Valid interval');
INSERT INTO test_intervals (interval_col, description) VALUES (NULL, 'NULL interval');
SELECT id, interval_col FROM test_intervals WHERE interval_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, INTERVAL '2 years 3 months' AS new_interval FROM test_intervals;
key_bug_features: Casting string to interval year to month
